stage_description: Stage C extractors (glossary / thesis / judgment_qa scaffolding) are complete. Glossary (AAP + AS) and thesis (AAP + AS) output is written to data/. Judgment Q&A synthesis prompts are prepared in data/judgment_prompts.jsonl; synthesis itself runs inside a Claude Code session (no SDK call, no metered cost), gated by 20-entry hand-review rounds via scripts/validate_judgment.py. AKC and Contemplative Agent glossaries were intentionally skipped because their glossary files are multi-language translation tables, not concept definitions; concept-level coverage is provided by ADR explain + judgment pairs. Final train/valid assembly waits for Stage D verification LoRA.
